title: Lakebase Autoscaling now available in three additional regions
body:
Lakebase Autoscaling is now available in three additional regions:

* `ca-central-1` (Canada Central)
* `eu-west-2` (Europe – London)
* `sa-east-1` (South America – São Paulo)

See [Get started with Lakebase Autoscaling](/aws/en/oltp/projects/get-started).
